title: entandrophragma angolense
intro: Entandrophragma angolense, also known as the yellow-stemmed granda or Angola mahogany, is a medium-sized tree species native to tropical Africa. It has been found to possess various medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Entandrophragma angolense include its potential to treat fever, rheumatism, and skin conditions, as well as its ability to protect against oxidative stress and inflammation. Traditional herbal preparations of the plant include infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which are used to treat various ailments and promote overall well-being.
